Content:
OpenSpot Music

Stream & download high-quality music, free, no ads, no login.

Content:
Download(v3.1.5) 👉 HERE

release date: 03/06/2026
--- ### What's New in v3.1.5 - Import music directly from any public Spotify playlist URL. - Added support for Trending (from Spotify) in 75+ countries. - Fixed an issue where some playlists, albums, or songs appeared empty or incomplete in certain countries. - Fixed downloads being interrupted or killed while running in the background. - Fixed various offline mode issues for a more reliable listening experience. - Minor bug fixes and performance improvements. ### If you have any suggestion (new add-on or fix), message me on telegram > https://t.me/deveIoper_X --- ## ✨ Features
🎧 **High‑Quality Streaming**   ·   📥 **Offline Downloads**   ·   ❤️ **Likes & Custom Playlists** 🔄 **Background Play**   ·   🚫 **No Login Required**   ·   🆓 **100% Free & Ad‑Free**
### 🌍 Languages Supported (i18n) | 🇩🇪 Deutsch | 🇺🇸 English | 🇪🇸 Español | 🇫🇷 Français | 🇮🇱 עברית | 🇮🇳 हिन्दी | 🇷🇺 Русский | 🇨🇳 中文 | 🇹🇷 Türkçe | |------------|------------|------------|------------|----------|------------|------------|--------|------------| *More languages coming soon — contributions welcome!*

--- ### v3.1.5版本更新内容 - 可直接从任意公开的Spotify歌单URL导入音乐。 - 新增对75+国家Spotify热门榜单的支持。 - 修复某些国家歌单、专辑或歌曲显示为空或不完整的问题。 - 修复后台运行时下载被中断或停止的问题。 - 修复多项离线模式问题，提升离线收听体验稳定性。 - 小幅修复漏洞及提升性能。 ### 如有任何建议（新增功能或修复问题），请在Telegram上联系我 > https://t.me/deveIoper_X --- ## ✨ 功能特色
🎧 **高品质流媒体播放**   ·   📥 **离线下载**   ·   ❤️ **喜欢&自定义歌单** 🔄 **后台播放**   ·   🚫 **无需登录**   ·   🆓 **完全免费&无广告**
### 🌍 支持的语言 (i18n) | 🇩🇪 德语 | 🇺🇸 英语 | 🇪🇸 西班牙语 | 🇫🇷 法语 | 🇮🇱 希伯来语 | 🇮🇳 印地语 | 🇷🇺 俄语 | 🇨🇳 中文 | 🇹🇷 土耳其语 | |------------|------------|------------|------------|----------|------------|------------|--------|------------| *更多语言即将上线 — 欢迎贡献！*

Content:
---

### 🎨 Look & Feel
- **Revamped UI** – clean, modern design with smooth transitions
- **Mini Player** – capsule‑style mini player on compatible devices (OnePlus, etc.)
- **Theming** – Dark mode, Light mode, and Auto mode

### 🎼 Music Experience
- **Search** – find songs, public playlists, albums, and artists
- **Offline Listening** – download tracks and play them without internet
- **Custom Playlists** – create, manage, and organize your own collections
- **Import Music** directly from spotify playlist url
- **Trending Songs** – region‑based trending tracks powered by IPinfo
- **Artist Albums & Playlists** – full discography browsing now supported

### ⚡ Performance & Stability
- **Improved YouTube API** – more reliable streaming
- **Playback Upgrades** – smoother performance, fixed duration and background playback bugs
- **Headset & Lockscreen Controls** – seamless notification controls
- **Paginated Artist Songs** – all songs load completely

---

## 📖 Overview

This monorepo delivers **two fully independent music streaming apps** built with cutting‑edge technologies:

| App | Platforms | Framework | Location |
|-----|-----------|-----------|----------|
| 📱 **Mobile** | Android, iOS | React Native + Expo | `openspot-mobile/` |
| 🖥️ **Desktop** | macOS, Windows/Linux | Tauri + React | `openspot-desktop/` |

Both apps share the same powerful streaming core, giving you a seamless listening experience across all your devices.

---

## 🧰 Tech Stack
Translation:
---

### 🎨 外观与体验
- **全新界面** – 简洁、现代化设计，带有流畅过渡动画
- **迷你播放器** – 在兼容设备（如一加等）上支持胶囊式迷你播放器
- **主题切换** – 支持深色模式、浅色模式和自动切换模式

### 🎼 音乐体验
- **搜索** – 查找歌曲、公开歌单、专辑和艺术家
- **离线收听** – 下载曲目，无需网络即可播放
- **自定义歌单** – 创建、管理和组织你的个人收藏
- **直接导入音乐**，支持从 Spotify 歌单链接导入
- **热门歌曲** – 基于地区的热门曲目，由 IPinfo 提供支持
- **艺术家专辑与歌单** – 现已支持完整的作品集浏览

### ⚡ 性能与稳定性
- **改进的 YouTube API** – 提供更可靠的流媒体播放
- **播放升级** – 性能更流畅，修复了时长和后台播放问题
- **耳机及锁屏控制** – 通知栏无缝控制
- **分页加载艺术家歌曲** – 所有歌曲完整加载

---

## 📖 概览

本 monorepo 提供了**两个完全独立的音乐流媒体应用**，采用前沿技术构建：

| 应用 | 平台 | 框架 | 位置 |
|-----|-----------|-----------|----------|
| 📱 **移动端** | Android, iOS | React Native + Expo | `openspot-mobile/` |
| 🖥️ **桌面端** | macOS, Windows/Linux | Tauri + React | `openspot-desktop/` |

两款应用共用同一个强大的流媒体核心，带来跨设备无缝聆听体验。

---

## 🧰 技术栈

### 📱 Mobile `React Native` · `Expo Router` · `Expo AV` · `EAS Build` · `IPinfo API` ### 🖥️ Desktop `Tauri` · `React` · `Material‑UI` · `React Context + useReducer` ### 📊 Code Composition ![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-95.7%25-3178C6?style=flat-square&logo=typescript) ![JavaScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/JavaScript-2.6%25-F7DF1E?style=flat-square&logo=javascript) ![CSS](https://img.shields.io/badge/CSS-1.2%25-1572B6?style=flat-square&logo=css3) ![HTML](https://img.shields.io/badge/HTML-0.5%25-E34F26?style=flat-square&logo=html5) --- ## 🌍 Community & Support - 💬 **Telegram**: [@openspot_music](https://t.me/openspot_music) - 🐛 **Issues**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/BlackHatDevX/openspot-music-app/issues) --- ## 👤 Author **Jash Gro** [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/BlackHatDevX-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/BlackHatDevX) [![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/jash--gro-0A66C2?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin)](https://linkedin.com/in/jash-gro/) [![Portfolio](https://img.shields.io/badge/Portfolio-bit.ly/jashgro-ff69b4?style=for-the-badge)](https://bit.ly/jashgro) ## 📄 License This project is licensed under the **MIT License** – see the [LICENSE](./LICENSE) file for details. ---
⭐ If you enjoy OpenSpot Music, drop a star – it really helps!
Your support keeps the music playing for everyone.
